scripts.prebuild: node scripts/apply-build-patches.mjs && node scripts/apply-landmark-mode-isolated-polygon-fill.mjs && node scripts/apply-landmark-mode-visibility-hard-fix.mjs && node scripts/apply-landmark-mode-full-isolation-fix.mjs && node scripts/apply-landmark-visual-compact-fix.mjs && node scripts/apply-landmark-keybindings-and-convex-fill-fix.mjs && node scripts/apply-landmark-tools-safe-rewrite.mjs && node scripts/apply-landmark-disable-freehand-mode.mjs && node scripts/apply-landmark-loadlabels-hard-replace.mjs && node scripts/apply-landmark-visible-restore-hard-fix.mjs && node scripts/apply-landmark-current-export-fix.mjs && node scripts/apply-coco-labels-hard-repair.mjs
